basics.name: Zixu Wang
basics.summary: Undergraduate in Department of Automation, Tsinghua University

education.area: Undergraduate in Department of Automation, School of Information Science and Technology

portfolio.name: Critical Path Method Project Scheduler
portfolio.description: C++ project scheduling system implementing the Critical Path Method (CPM) algorithm with MVC architecture and template-based file I/O plugin system. Object-Oriented Programming Training, Tsinghua University (In Progress).

portfolio.name: Catgirl Resource Machine --- A Programming Puzzle Game
portfolio.description: C++/Qt 6 puzzle game inspired by Human Resource Machine, featuring an assembly-like instruction set with a 4-level campaign. Fundamentals of Programming, Tsinghua University.

portfolio.name: Home Service Robot Vision Pipeline (YOLO11-seg + SAM3)
portfolio.description: Full-stack deep learning pipeline for household object detection and instance segmentation. SAM3 annotation + YOLO11-seg inference + React frontend. Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, Tsinghua University.
